title: K9 officer and co-accused back in Mossel Bay court
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The case against Mossel...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The case against Mossel Bay's Sergeant Jacobus ‘JM’ Spangenberg of the K9 Langeberg Unit and his co-accused Xolisa Msizi, was back in the Mossel Bay Magistrate's Court today, 23 January.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The case against Mossel Bay's Sergeant Jacobus ‘JM’ Spangenberg of the K9 Langeberg Unit and his co-accused Xolisa Msizi, was back in the Mossel Bay Magistrate's Court today, 23 January."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The pair are facing charges of fraud, corruption, defeating the ends of justice as well as possession of explosives."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Spangenberg was arrested on 8 October last year and Msizi the following day, following a three-year investigation by George’s Serious Organised Crime Unit into a 2022 operation that involved the discovery of an M26 hand grenade near KwaNonqaba.","html":"Spangenberg was arrested on 8 October last year and Msizi the following day, following a three-year investigation by George’s Serious Organised Crime Unit into a 2022 operation that involved the discovery of an M26 hand grenade near KwaNonqaba."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Both of the accused were released on bail during previous court appearances. They are expected to appear in court again on 23 February for a regional court date.","html":"Both of the accused were released on bail during previous court appearances. They are expected to appear in court again on 23 February for a regional court date."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Previous articles:","html":"Previous articles: "},{"type":"list","items":["Fraud, corruption case postponed to January","Mossel Bay K9 sergeant arrested","Second accused charged in case against K9 Sergeant","Mossel Bay K9 sergeant up for possession of explosives, fraud","Bail granted for corruption, fraud co-accused"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: K9 officer and co-accused back in Mossel Bay court
